text:
{
  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "PowerShell modified the Background Activity Moderator (BAM) service settings, which can be used to manipulate execution tracking or hide activity.",
  "indicators": [
    "powershell.exe",
    "reg_set",
    "HKLM\\System\\CurrentControlSet\\Services\\bam\\State\\UserSettings",
    "Binary Data",
    "HKLM\\System\\CurrentControlSet\\Services\\Tcpip\\Parameters"
  ]
}
